[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010101 3
1 1010111 5
2 0110100 3
3 1011100 4
4 1101011 5
5 0001000 1
6 0110010 3
7 0110100 3

12 0000000 a

70 0000101 2
